disclaimer: Broad public UK mobile decision directory. Inclusion does not imply endorsement, live price verification or suitability. Edge-case, business, retailer, travel-eSIM and legacy entries are labelled so users can avoid bad-fit options.

providers.name: EE
providers.notes: Direct UK network. Confirm direct-plan pricing, speed caps and annual price rises.

providers.name: O2
providers.notes: Direct UK network. Confirm airtime terms, Volt eligibility and roaming policy.

providers.name: Three
providers.notes: Direct UK network. Confirm contract length, roaming and speed terms.

providers.name: Vodafone
providers.notes: Direct UK network. Confirm plan tier, roaming and annual price-rise terms.

providers.name: SMARTY
providers.notes: Rolling SIM-only plans; confirm promo allowance and fair use.

providers.name: VOXI
providers.notes: Vodafone youth/online brand; confirm pass terms and roaming.

providers.name: giffgaff
providers.notes: Goodybag/SIM-only plans; confirm contract and EU roaming caps.

providers.name: Tesco Mobile
providers.notes: Confirm Clubcard pricing and contract terms.

providers.notes: Confirm data rollover/swap features and final terms.
